sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (val Decimal(76, 5)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY val;
UPDATE test_decimal SET val = toDecimal256('456.789', 2) WHERE val = toDecimal256(123.456, 3);
SELECT toDecimal256(val, 4) AS scaled_val, toTypeName(scaled_val) AS type_scaled FROM test_decimal;
SELECT toDecimal256(val + 1000, 2) AS incremented_val FROM test_decimal WHERE val < toDecimal256(200, 0);
